case_number: Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 386 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 13.03.2025 Mr. Asadullah Soomro, Advocate holds brief for Mr. Ashok Kumar K.Jamba, Advocate for Respondents No.4 to 7 Mr. Karim Bux Janweri, Assistant Attorney General >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the petitioner nor any intimation is received. Lastly this petition was fixed in Court on 07.03.2023 thereafter no one has turned up to pursue the matter vigilantly. The conduct of the petitioner and his Counsel depicts that they are no more interested to proceed with the matter. Accordingly, the instant Constitutional Petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge Judge ARBROHI
